roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISPO (TBH BY JUDGE TSENIN)/NP/DAWT/VD: LAST DAY OF 06-06-22 (COVID19)/GTW/VD: JURY TRIAL DATE OF 07-29-22/X:THE DEFENDANT IS REFERRED TOPRE-TRIAL DIVERSION AND IS TO COMPLETE THE FOLLOWING THROUGH PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR APERIOD OF FOUR MONTHS:/X:NO NEW ARRESTS LEADING TO CHARGES; NOVIOLATIONS OF THE SAO; SHOW PROOF AT THE 4 MONTH MARK THAT HE IS STILL GAINFULLY, LAWFULLY EMPLOYED; 5 T4C ORLATINO COMMISSION CLASSES/CONTD: DISMISSAL 10-14-22 IN DEPT 14 (TBH BY JUDGE TSENIN)/

/CAL:NO BAIL BW STAY OF 03-28-22/INTC/BWSTAY:03-28-22/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 06-06-22/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE-S23 AND TRIAL-S22/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 04-07-22/X: NO BAIL/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: SPANISH INTERPRETER, ANDREA POLLOCK, IS SWORNTO RELIEVE MR, BINAISA/INTC/X: CERTIFIED LAW CLERK, MAX ATCHERSON, APPEARS UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF ILONA SOLOMON FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/WITEXCL: DEFENSE/FAWC/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER JASON NORD/WIT SWORNDA: SFPD OFFICER BRADEN LYONS/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER ANTHONY SCAFANI//WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER PERNISHA BATTLE/X: THE COURT RULES THAT OFFICERNORD IS NOT QUALIFIED AS AN EXPERT/EXHM: PEOPLE'S 1) 8,5 X 11 COLOR PHOTOON 1 SHEET OF PAPER, FOLDED IN HALF/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2) 1 LARGE, CLEAR PLASTIC BAG WITH DIFFERENCE SUBSTANCES/EXHM: PEOPLE'S 3) PROP 115 INTERVIEW FORM/EXHM: PEOPLE'S 4) LAB EXAMINATION REPORT/EXHMA: DEFENSE'S A) VIDEO DISPLAY OF INDIVIDUAL IN STREET/HTA1: 1,2,3, AND 4/X: DEFENDANT'S STATUS REMAINS THE SAME/X: DEFENDANT NO LONGER HAS TO REPORT TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION//X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22 ON 03-28-22/DOP/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT HAS A POSITIVE ACM REPORT//X: CAD RECEIVED FROM SUBPOENA RECORDS & GIVEN TO DEFENSE WITHOUT STIPULATION/LDPX: 03-25-22(60TH)/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOPC/TE: 75 MINUTES/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTORD:SPANISH/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60//LDPX:03-25-22/SAORD/SA2:600 BLOCK OF EDDY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: TRIAL, LD 06-06-22/DAWT/CAUSE1/X: WRITTEN ORDER SIGNED AND FILED//CONT/SB: 2 HOURS/
/CAL:TRIAL, LD 06-06-22/INTC/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE 06-02-22 AND TRIAL 06-06-22/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/NP/X: PER DEFENSE COUNSEL, DEFENDANT IS ILL TODAY/CONT/DOP/LDPX: 03-25-22(60)/
